seoTitle: Netley vs New Port — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Netley and New Port. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Netley vs New Port: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Netley and New Port.
heading: Netley vs New Port — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Netley, South Australia and New Port, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: New Port has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Netley (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Netley or New Port safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Netley has a flood risk score of 34/100, while New Port scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Netley scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. New Port scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Netley or New Port?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. New Port has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
